upload.title: Your private toolkit for files & code.
upload.subtitle: 39 tools for PDFs, images, and developer workflows — all running in your browser. No uploads, no accounts, free forever.

uploader.add_more: drop or click to add more

tooltip.partial_support: This format can only be converted as {direction}.
tooltip.video_server_processing: All conversions happen locally on your device.

archive_file.extracted: Extracted {extract_count} files from {filename}. {ignore_count} items were ignored.

convert.large_file_warning: Due to browser / device limitations, conversion is disabled for this file as it is larger than {limit}GB. We recommend using Firefox or Safari for files of this size since they have less limitations.

external_warning.title: Large file warning
external_warning.text: This file is quite large and may take a while to convert in the browser. Do you want to continue?

errors.vertd_server: This file format is not supported for conversion.
errors.vertd_generic_body: An error occurred while trying to convert your file. Please try again or try a different format.
errors.vertd_details_body: The following error information may help with troubleshooting:
errors.vertd_details_footer: View our [privacy_link]privacy policy[/privacy_link] for more details.
errors.vertd_ratelimit: The file '{filename}' has failed to convert multiple times. Please try a different format or a smaller file.
errors.unsupported_format: Only image, video, audio, and document files are supported
errors.pdf_redirect_desc: PDFs aren't converted here — use PDF Tools to merge, split, compress, rotate, and more.
errors.format_output_only: This format can currently only be used as output (converted to), not as input.
errors.vertd_not_found: The video converter could not be initialized. Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.worker_downloading: The {type} converter is loading, please wait a few moments.
errors.worker_error: The {type} converter had an error during initialization, please try again later.
errors.worker_timeout: The {type} converter is taking longer than expected to initialize, please wait a few more moments or refresh the page.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.brightness_description: Want a sunny flash-bang, or a quiet lonely night?
appearance.effect_description: Would you like fancy effects, or a more static experience?

conversion.title: Conversion
conversion.filename_description: Set the output file name pattern. The extension is added automatically.
conversion.default_format_description: This will change the default format selected when you select a file of this file type.
conversion.metadata_description: This changes whether any metadata (EXIF, song info, etc.) on the original file is preserved in converted files.
conversion.quality_description: This changes the default output quality of the converted files (in its category). Higher values may result in longer conversion times and file size.
conversion.quality_video: This changes the default output quality of the converted video files. Higher values may result in longer conversion times and file size.

vertd.title: Video conversion
vertd.description: Video conversion is handled locally using FFmpeg WebAssembly. Your videos never leave your device.
vertd.hosting_info: All video processing happens in your browser using WebAssembly technology.
vertd.speed_description: This describes the tradeoff between speed and quality. Faster speeds will result in lower quality, but will get the job done quicker.

privacy.title: Privacy & data
privacy.plausible_description: We use [plausible_link]Cloudflare Web Analytics[/plausible_link], a privacy-focused analytics tool, to gather completely anonymous statistics. All data is anonymized and aggregated, and no identifiable information is ever sent or stored. You can choose to opt out below.
privacy.cache_description: We cache the converter files on your browser so you don't have to reload them every time, improving performance and reducing data usage.
privacy.site_data_description: Clear all site data including settings and cached files, resetting LocalConvert to its default state and reloading the page.
privacy.clear_all_data_confirm: This will reset all settings & cache, then reload the page. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.all_data_cleared: All site data cleared! Reloading page...
privacy.all_data_clear_error: Failed to clear all site data.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select your preferred language for the LocalConvert interface.

about.title: About
about.hero_title: Built because file converters shouldn't need your files.

why.title: Why LocalConvert?
why.description:
File converters have always disappointed us. They're slow, require accounts, and send your files to third-party servers you know nothing about. We decided to fix that.

Every single file you convert — images, audio, video, and documents — is processed entirely on your device using WebAssembly. Nothing ever leaves your browser. There are no servers involved, no uploads, and no one can ever see your files.

principles.label: Principles
principles.p1_title: Your files stay on your device
principles.p1_desc: Every tool runs locally in your browser via WebAssembly. There is no server. Your files are never uploaded, transmitted, or stored anywhere.
principles.p2_desc: No signup, no email, no payment wall, no file size limits. Open the site, use the tools, close the tab. That's it.
principles.p3_desc: The entire codebase is public under AGPL-3.0. Don't trust us — read the code. Every privacy claim is verifiable.

origin.title: Origin
origin.description: This project started as a fork of VERT.sh (AGPL-3.0). We've since rebuilt the brand, added 30+ tools, redesigned the interface, and expanded to 28 languages — but the core conversion architecture traces back to the VERT team's excellent work.

sponsors.title: Support
sponsors.description: LocalConvert is free and open source. If you find it useful, consider supporting the project. Contact us at

donate.title: Support LocalConvert
donate.description: With your support, we can keep maintaining and improving LocalConvert.
donate.payment_failed: Payment failed: {message}{period} You have not been charged.
donate.donation_error: An error occurred while processing your donation. Please try again later.
donate.payment_error: Error fetching payment details. Please try again later.
donate.donation_notice_official: Your support helps to maintain and improve LocalConvert.
donate.donation_notice_unofficial: This is a third-party instance of LocalConvert. If you wish to support the original project, please visit the official site instead.

credits.title: Credits
credits.contact_team: If you would like to contact the development team, please use the email found on the "Resources" card.
credits.notable_description: We'd like to thank these people for their major contributions to VERT, the project LocalConvert is based on.
credits.github_description: Big thanks to all these people for helping out! [github_link]Want to help too?[/github_link]
credits.no_contributors: Seems like no one has contributed yet... [contribute_link]be the first to contribute![/contribute_link]
credits.libraries_description: A big thanks to FFmpeg (audio, video), ImageMagick (images) and Pandoc (documents) for maintaining such excellent libraries for so many years. LocalConvert relies on them to provide you with your conversions.

roles.lead_developer: Lead developer; conversion backend, UI implementation

errors.magick: Error in Magick worker, image conversion may not work as expected.
errors.ffmpeg: Error loading FFmpeg, some features may not work as expected.
errors.pandoc: Error loading Pandoc worker, document conversion may not work as expected.
errors.file_too_large: This file exceeds the {limit}GB browser / device limit. Try Firefox or Safari to convert this large file, which typically have higher limits.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description:
LocalConvert's privacy policy is simple: your files never leave your device. All conversions — images, audio, video, and documents — happen entirely in your browser using WebAssembly. We don't use cookies or trackers, and analytics are completely anonymous via Cloudflare Web Analytics.

LocalConvert is based on [vert_link]VERT.sh[/vert_link] (AGPL-3.0).

conversions.title: Conversions
conversions.description: All conversions happen entirely locally on your device using WebAssembly versions of the relevant tools (FFmpeg, ImageMagick, Pandoc). This means your files never leave your device and no one will ever have access to them. Unlike other converters, this includes video — video conversion is also done locally in your browser.

donations.title: Donations
donations.description: If donation functionality is available, payment processing may be handled by a third-party provider. External network requests to the payment provider are deferred, and are only made after you click the button to pay.

conversion_errors.title: Conversion Errors
conversion_errors.description: When a conversion fails, error information stays on your device. No error data is automatically sent to any server. Error details may include:
conversion_errors.footer: All error information stays on your device and is never transmitted.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: We use Cloudflare Web Analytics for completely anonymous and aggregated analytics. Cloudflare Web Analytics does not use cookies and complies with all major privacy regulations (GDPR/CCPA/PECR). You can opt out of analytics in the "Privacy & data" section in [settings_link]settings[/settings_link] and read more about Cloudflare Web Analytics [plausible_link]here[/plausible_link].

local_storage.title: Local Storage
local_storage.description:
We use your browser's local storage to save your settings. No personal data is stored or transmitted.

The WebAssembly versions of the conversion tools we use (FFmpeg, ImageMagick, Pandoc) are also stored locally on your browser when you first visit the website, so you don't need to reload them each visit. No personal data is stored or transmitted. You may view or delete this data at any time in the "Privacy & data" section in [settings_link]settings[/settings_link].

pdf_tools.title: PDF Tools
pdf_tools.subtitle: Every operation runs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

tools.merge_desc: Combine multiple PDFs into one file
tools.split_desc: Extract pages or split into individual files
tools.organize_desc: Reorder or delete pages with visual thumbnails
tools.images_to_pdf_desc: Convert JPG, PNG, or WEBP images to a PDF
tools.pdf_to_images_desc: Export each page as a JPG or PNG image
tools.compress_desc: Reduce file size by re-rendering pages as JPEG
tools.watermark_desc: Stamp text on every page of a PDF
tools.page_numbers_desc: Add sequential numbering to every page
tools.metadata_desc: View and edit title, author, and other PDF properties
tools.pdf_to_ppt_desc: Convert each PDF page into a presentation slide
tools.sign_desc: Draw, type, or upload a signature
tools.edit_desc: Add text to any page of a PDF
tools.password_desc: Encrypt a PDF with a password and set permissions
tools.unlock_desc: Remove password protection from a PDF
tools.pdf_to_text_desc: Extract all text from a PDF
tools.grayscale_desc: Convert PDF pages to black and white
tools.from_docx_desc: Convert DOCX files to PDF — privately in your browser
tools.from_xlsx_desc: Convert spreadsheets to PDF — locally, no upload
tools.to_docx_desc: Extract PDF text as an editable DOCX file

image_tools.title: Image Tools
image_tools.subtitle: Every operation runs entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

tools.crop_desc: Draw a rectangle to crop any area
tools.meme_desc: Add top and bottom text to any image
tools.batch_desc: Apply the same operation to multiple images
tools.qr_desc: Generate QR codes from text or URLs
tools.blur_desc: Blur a region of an image for privacy
tools.filters_desc: Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation, and more
tools.video_to_gif_desc: Convert any video to an animated GIF

dev_tools.title: Developer Tools
dev_tools.subtitle: Format, encode, and hash — all in your browser. Nothing leaves your device.

tools.markdown_desc: Write markdown and preview rendered HTML
tools.diff_desc: Compare two texts and highlight differences
tools.word_count_desc: Count words, characters, sentences, and more
tools.css_minify_desc: Minify CSS by removing comments and whitespace

tools_common.privacy_note: ✓ Your files never leave your device.
tools_common.seo_step1: Select your file from your device
tools_common.seo_why_private: 100% private — your files never leave your device. No server uploads, ever.
tools_common.seo_why_free: Free forever with no file size limits. No accounts, no subscriptions.
tools_common.seo_why_offline: Works offline as an installed app. No internet required after first load.

rotate_image.title: Rotate Image
rotate_image.desc: Pick an angle and see the result instantly.

crop_image.title: Crop Image
crop_image.desc: Drag corners, edges, or draw a new selection.
crop_image.err_area: Select a crop area on the image.

watermark_image.title: Watermark Image
watermark_image.desc: Adjust settings and see the watermark update live.

meme.title: Meme Generator
meme.desc: Type and see your meme update live.

batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.desc: Apply the same operation to multiple images at once.
batch.err_text: Enter at least one line of text.
batch.trim_help: Trims {percent}% from each edge of every image.

qr.title: QR Code Generator
qr.desc: Generate a QR code and see it update live.

merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.desc: Combine multiple PDFs into one. Drag rows to reorder.
merge.seo_faq1_q: Is it safe to merge PDFs online?
merge.seo_faq1_a: Yes. LocalConvert runs entirely in your browser — your files are never uploaded to any server. The merging happens on your device.
merge.seo_faq2_q: Is there a limit on how many PDFs I can merge?
merge.seo_faq2_a: No. You can merge as many PDFs as your browser's memory allows. There are no file size or count limits.

split.title: Split PDF
split.desc: Extract pages or split every page into its own file.
split.help: Click to toggle, tap the dot for single page
split.seo_faq1_q: Can I extract specific pages from a PDF?
split.seo_faq1_a: Yes. Select the pages you want to extract, and LocalConvert will create a new PDF with just those pages.
split.seo_faq2_q: Will splitting a PDF reduce quality?
split.seo_faq2_a: No. Splitting extracts pages without re-encoding, so the original quality is preserved.

rotate_pdf.title: Rotate Pages
rotate_pdf.desc: Rotate individual pages or the entire PDF.
rotate_pdf.seo_faq1_a: Yes. You can rotate specific pages or the entire PDF at once. Choose 90°, 180°, or 270° rotation.
rotate_pdf.seo_faq2_a: No. Pages are rotated without re-encoding, so the original quality is fully preserved.

organize.title: Organize Pages
organize.desc: Drag to reorder, or use arrows. Delete pages you don't need.
organize.seo_faq1_q: Can I delete pages from a PDF?
organize.seo_faq1_a: Yes. Drag pages to reorder them and click the delete button to remove unwanted pages.
organize.seo_faq2_q: Can I see thumbnails of each page?
organize.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Visual thumbnails of each page are shown so you can easily identify and arrange them.

images_to_pdf.title: Images → PDF
images_to_pdf.desc: Convert JPG, PNG, or WEBP images to a single PDF. Drag to reorder.
images_to_pdf.seo_faq1_q: What image formats can I convert to PDF?
images_to_pdf.seo_faq1_a: JPG, PNG, and WEBP images are supported. Each image becomes a page in the PDF.
images_to_pdf.seo_faq2_q: Can I arrange the image order?
images_to_pdf.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Add multiple images and arrange them in the desired order before converting.

pdf_to_images.title: PDF → Images
pdf_to_images.desc: Export each PDF page as a JPG or PNG image.
pdf_to_images.seo_faq1_q: What image format will I get?
pdf_to_images.seo_faq1_a: You can choose between JPG and PNG output. Each PDF page becomes a separate image.
pdf_to_images.seo_faq2_a: Each page is exported as a separate image. For multi-page PDFs, you'll get a ZIP file with all images.

pdf_to_ppt.title: PDF to PowerPoint
pdf_to_ppt.desc: Convert each PDF page into a presentation slide.
pdf_to_ppt.seo_faq1_q: How does PDF to PowerPoint work?
pdf_to_ppt.seo_faq1_a: Each PDF page is rendered as an image and placed into a PowerPoint slide. Text is not editable.
pdf_to_ppt.seo_faq2_q: Can I edit the slides after conversion?
pdf_to_ppt.seo_faq2_a: The slides contain page images. You can add text boxes and annotations in PowerPoint.

compress.title: Compress PDF
compress.desc: Reduce file size by re-rendering each page as JPEG.
compress.warning: Compressed PDFs have image-only pages. Text will not be selectable, and links/forms will be removed.
compress.seo_faq1_q: How much can I reduce the PDF file size?
compress.seo_faq1_a: Typically 50-80% reduction depending on the content. PDFs with many images see the biggest savings.
compress.seo_faq2_a: Text is re-rendered as images during compression. For text-heavy documents, use a higher quality setting.

watermark_pdf.title: Add Watermark
watermark_pdf.desc: Adjust settings and see the watermark live on the page.
watermark_pdf.seo_faq1_q: Can I use an image as a watermark?
watermark_pdf.seo_faq1_a: Currently, text-based watermarks are supported. You can customize the text, size, opacity, and rotation angle.
watermark_pdf.seo_faq2_q: Will the watermark cover the content?
watermark_pdf.seo_faq2_a: No. Watermarks are placed with adjustable opacity, so your content remains readable beneath them.

page_numbers.title: Add Page Numbers
page_numbers.desc: See the page number update live as you change settings.
page_numbers.seo_faq1_q: Where can I place the page numbers?
page_numbers.seo_faq1_a: You can place numbers at the top or bottom of the page, aligned left, center, or right.
page_numbers.seo_faq2_q: Can I customize the numbering format?
page_numbers.seo_faq2_a: Yes. You can set the starting number, font size, and position.

metadata.title: Edit Metadata
metadata.desc: View and edit title, author, and other PDF properties.
metadata.seo_faq1_q: What PDF metadata can I edit?
metadata.seo_faq1_a: You can edit the title, author, subject, and keywords of any PDF file.
metadata.seo_faq2_q: Is editing metadata safe for the PDF content?
metadata.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Only the metadata properties are changed — the PDF content remains untouched.

crop_pdf.title: Crop PDF
crop_pdf.desc: Drag the edges to set margins, or type values below.
crop_pdf.err_margins: Margins too large — no area remaining.
crop_pdf.seo_faq1_q: Can I crop different pages differently?
crop_pdf.seo_faq1_a: The crop margins are applied uniformly to all pages. For per-page cropping, split the PDF first, crop each part, then merge.
crop_pdf.seo_faq2_a: Cropping hides content outside the margins but may not significantly reduce file size, as the hidden data can remain in the file.

sign.title: Sign PDF
sign.desc: Create a signature, then click on the page to place it.
sign.step2: 2. Click on the page to place your signature
sign.err_place: Click on the page to place your signature.
sign.seo_faq1_q: How can I create a signature?
sign.seo_faq1_a: You can draw a signature with your mouse or finger, type your name, or upload a signature image.
sign.seo_faq2_a: No. Your signature never leaves your device. It's processed entirely in your browser.

edit.title: Edit PDF
edit.desc: Click on the page to place text. Drag to reposition.
edit.keyboard_help: Ctrl+Z undo · Del remove · Arrow keys nudge · Esc deselect
edit.err_text: Click on the page to place text.
edit.seo_faq1_q: What kind of edits can I make?
edit.seo_faq1_a: You can add text to any page of a PDF. Choose the font size, color, and position by clicking on the page.
edit.seo_faq2_q: Can I edit existing text in the PDF?
edit.seo_faq2_a: Currently you can add new text overlays. Editing existing text in PDFs requires the source document.

password.title: Password Protect PDF
password.desc: Encrypt a PDF with a password and set access permissions.
password.owner_help: Owner password grants full access. User password enforces the permissions below.
password.permissions_label: Permissions (for users opening with the password)
password.info: Encryption happens entirely in your browser. Your password and file never leave your device.
password.err_min_length: Password must be at least 4 characters.
password.seo_faq1_a: PDFs are encrypted using standard PDF security. The password is never sent anywhere — encryption happens in your browser.
password.seo_faq2_q: Can I set permissions like preventing printing?
password.seo_faq2_a: Yes. You can set permissions for printing, copying, and editing when protecting the PDF.

unlock.title: Unlock PDF
unlock.desc: Remove password protection from a PDF file.
unlock.info: This tool removes restrictions (printing, copying, editing) from PDFs. It works with most permission-locked files. Files with strong open-password encryption may not be supported.
unlock.err_fail: Failed to unlock. The file may not be encrypted or uses unsupported encryption.
unlock.password_hint: Only needed for PDFs that require a password to open.
unlock.seo_faq1_q: Can I remove a password from a PDF?
unlock.seo_faq1_a: Yes, if you know the current password. Enter it and LocalConvert will save an unprotected copy.
unlock.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Your password is only used in your browser to decrypt the file. It is never sent to any server.

color_picker.title: Color Picker
color_picker.desc: Click anywhere on the image to pick a color.

blur.title: Blur Region
blur.desc: Draw rectangles or ellipses over areas you want to blur.
blur.err_area: Draw at least one region to blur.
blur.help: drag to draw, click to select, handles to resize

pdf_to_text.title: PDF to Text
pdf_to_text.desc: Extract all text content from a PDF file.
pdf_to_text.no_text: No text found in this PDF.
pdf_to_text.seo_faq1_q: Does it work with scanned PDFs?
pdf_to_text.seo_faq1_a: No. Text extraction works with PDFs that contain actual text. Scanned documents (image-based) need OCR first.
pdf_to_text.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Text extraction supports all languages including Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and Cyrillic scripts.

grayscale.title: PDF to Grayscale
grayscale.desc: Convert all pages to black and white.
grayscale.warning: Grayscale PDFs have image-only pages. Text will not be selectable.
grayscale.seo_faq1_q: Will the text still be selectable after conversion?
grayscale.seo_faq1_a: No. Grayscale conversion renders each page as an image. Text will no longer be selectable or searchable.
grayscale.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Use the quality slider to balance between file size and image clarity.

hash_generator.title: Hash Generator
hash_generator.desc: Generate hashes for text or files.

base64.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
base64.desc: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 to text.

filters.title: Image Filters
filters.desc: Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation, sepia, and hue.

video_to_gif.title: Video to GIF
video_to_gif.desc: Convert any video to an animated GIF.

markdown.title: Markdown Preview
markdown.desc: Write markdown and see rendered HTML live.

diff.title: Text Diff
diff.desc: Compare two texts and see differences highlighted.

word_count.title: Word Counter
word_count.desc: Paste or type text to see live stats.
word_count.placeholder: Paste or type your text here…

css_minify.title: CSS Minifier
css_minify.desc: Remove comments and whitespace from CSS.

from_docx.title: Word to PDF
from_docx.desc: Convert DOCX and DOC files to PDF — privately, in your browser.
from_docx.invalid_file: Please select a DOCX or DOC file.
from_docx.disclaimer: Layout fidelity depends on document complexity. Complex tables and advanced formatting may be simplified.
from_docx.progress_hint: Processing your document locally — nothing is uploaded.
from_docx.seo_faq1_q: Will my Word document look the same as PDF?
from_docx.seo_faq1_a: Layout fidelity depends on document complexity. Simple documents convert well; complex tables and advanced formatting may be simplified.
from_docx.seo_faq2_q: Does it support .doc files (older Word format)?
from_docx.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Both .docx (modern) and .doc (legacy) Word formats are supported.

from_xlsx.title: Excel to PDF
from_xlsx.desc: Convert XLSX, XLS, ODS, and CSV spreadsheets to PDF — locally in your browser.
from_xlsx.invalid_file: Please select an Excel (XLSX/XLS), ODS, or CSV file.
from_xlsx.drop_formats: XLSX · XLS · ODS · CSV — or click to browse
from_xlsx.disclaimer: Column widths are auto-calculated. Wide sheets work best in landscape mode. Text may be truncated if cells contain very long values.
from_xlsx.progress_hint: Processing spreadsheet locally — nothing is uploaded.
from_xlsx.seo_faq1_q: Can I choose landscape or portrait for the PDF?
from_xlsx.seo_faq1_a: Yes. You can select page orientation before converting. Wide spreadsheets work best in landscape mode.
from_xlsx.seo_faq2_a: XLSX (Excel), XLS (legacy Excel), ODS (LibreOffice), and CSV files are all supported.

to_docx.title: PDF to Word
to_docx.desc: Extract text from PDF and save as an editable DOCX file — entirely in your browser.
to_docx.expect_headings: Headings and paragraph structure are detected automatically
to_docx.expect_tables: Tables, images, and complex layouts are simplified
to_docx.expect_scanned: Scanned (image-based) PDFs produce empty output — use OCR first
to_docx.progress_hint: Your file never leaves your device.
to_docx.seo_faq1_a: Text content and basic structure (headings, paragraphs) are preserved. Complex layouts, tables, and images are simplified.
to_docx.seo_faq2_q: Does it work with scanned PDFs?
to_docx.seo_faq2_a: No. Scanned (image-based) PDFs produce empty output. Use OCR software first to make the text extractable.

img_rotate.seo_faq1_a: You can rotate by 90°, 180°, or 270° clockwise. The rotation is instant and lossless.
img_rotate.seo_faq2_a: No. The image is rotated without recompression, preserving the original quality.

img_crop.seo_faq1_q: Can I set an exact crop size in pixels?
img_crop.seo_faq1_a: Yes. You can drag a crop rectangle or enter precise pixel dimensions for exact control.
img_crop.seo_faq2_q: What image formats can I crop?
img_crop.seo_faq2_a: JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, and most other common image formats are supported.

img_watermark.seo_faq1_a: Yes. You can control the opacity, position, size, and color of the text watermark.
img_watermark.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Once saved, the watermark is permanently embedded in the image.

img_meme.seo_faq1_q: Can I use my own images?
img_meme.seo_faq1_a: Yes. Select any image from your device, then add top and bottom text to create your meme.
img_meme.seo_faq2_q: Can I customize the font and color?
img_meme.seo_faq2_a: Yes. You can change the font size, color, and outline to match your meme style.

img_batch.seo_faq1_q: How many images can I process at once?
img_batch.seo_faq1_a: There is no fixed limit. You can process as many images as your device memory allows.
img_batch.seo_faq2_q: What operations can I apply in batch?
img_batch.seo_faq2_a: You can convert formats, resize, rotate, and apply quality settings to all selected images at once.

img_qr.seo_faq1_q: What can I encode in a QR code?
img_qr.seo_faq1_a: URLs, plain text, email addresses, phone numbers, or any text up to several thousand characters.
img_qr.seo_faq2_q: Can I customize the QR code appearance?
img_qr.seo_faq2_a: You can adjust the size and error correction level. The QR code is saved as a PNG image.

img_color_picker.seo_faq1_a: HEX, RGB, and HSL formats are all available. Click any pixel to instantly copy its color value.
img_color_picker.seo_faq2_q: Can I pick colors from any image type?
img_color_picker.seo_faq2_a: Yes. JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, and most other image formats are supported.

img_blur.seo_faq1_a: Yes. Draw multiple blur regions on the same image to hide several areas at once.
img_blur.seo_faq2_q: Can I adjust the blur intensity?
img_blur.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Use the intensity slider to control how strong the blur effect is.

img_filters.seo_faq1_a: Brightness, contrast, saturation, hue rotation, grayscale, sepia, blur, and invert are all available.
img_filters.seo_faq2_a: Yes. All filter adjustments stack together and are applied to the image in real time.

img_video_to_gif.seo_faq1_a: MP4, WEBM, MOV, AVI, and most common video formats are supported.
img_video_to_gif.seo_faq2_q: Can I set the GIF duration and frame rate?
img_video_to_gif.seo_faq2_a: Yes. You can set the start time, duration, and frame rate to control the output GIF.

dev_json.seo_faq1_a: Yes. Invalid JSON is flagged with an error message showing the exact line and character where parsing failed.
dev_json.seo_faq2_a: Yes. You can both format (beautify) and minify JSON with a single click.

dev_hash.seo_faq1_a: MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 are all available.
dev_hash.seo_faq2_a: Yes. All hashing runs in your browser using the Web Crypto API. Your data never leaves your device.

dev_base64.seo_faq1_q: Can I encode files, not just text?
dev_base64.seo_faq1_a: The tool encodes and decodes text strings. For file encoding, convert the file content to text first.
dev_base64.seo_faq2_a: Yes. UTF-8 encoded text including non-Latin characters is fully supported.

dev_markdown.seo_faq1_a: Yes. Tables, task lists, strikethrough, and other GitHub Markdown extensions are rendered correctly.
dev_markdown.seo_faq2_q: Can I export the rendered HTML?
dev_markdown.seo_faq2_a: The preview shows rendered output in real time. You can copy the HTML from the preview panel.

dev_diff.seo_faq1_q: Does it show line-by-line or word-by-word differences?
dev_diff.seo_faq1_a: Differences are highlighted at the line level with additions and removals clearly marked in color.
dev_diff.seo_faq2_a: No hard limit. The tool runs in your browser, so large texts may be slower on older devices.

dev_word_count.seo_faq1_a: Words, characters (with and without spaces), sentences, paragraphs, and estimated reading time.
dev_word_count.seo_faq2_q: Does it work with non-English text?
dev_word_count.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Word counting works with all languages and character sets.

dev_url_encode.seo_faq1_a: Special characters like spaces, ampersands, question marks, and non-ASCII characters are percent-encoded per RFC 3986.
dev_url_encode.seo_faq2_q: Can I decode a full URL with parameters?
dev_url_encode.seo_faq2_a: Yes. Paste any URL-encoded string and it will be decoded to readable text.

dev_css_minify.seo_faq1_a: Comments, unnecessary whitespace, newlines, and redundant semicolons are removed to reduce file size.
dev_css_minify.seo_faq2_q: How much smaller will my CSS be?
dev_css_minify.seo_faq2_a: Typically 20-40% smaller depending on formatting. Heavily commented files see the biggest reduction.

toast.insecure_context: You are visiting LocalConvert in an insecure context (e.g. accessing over HTTP instead of HTTPS). Some features may not work as expected.

toolkit.label: Your workshop
toolkit.title: Every tool runs in your browser
toolkit.pdf_desc: Merge, split, compress, watermark, sign, edit, and 12 more
toolkit.image_desc: Crop, resize, filters, blur, watermark, meme, and more
toolkit.dev_desc: JSON, hash, Base64, markdown, diff, and more

gpu.title: GPU-powered video conversion
gpu.desc: Conversions marked with ⚡ use your device's graphics hardware. Faster conversions, lower CPU usage — still 100% local.
gpu.input_label: GPU when converting to formats above

privacy.title: 100% Private by Design
privacy.point1: Your files never leave your device
privacy.point2: All 39 tools run entirely in your browser — zero server uploads
privacy.label: Privacy first

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes — completely free, no account required, no hidden fees. LocalConvert is open source under the AGPL-3.0 license.
faq.a2: Completely. All processing runs in your browser using WebAssembly. Your files never touch our servers — not even for a moment.
faq.a3: Convert 200+ file formats (images, audio, video, documents), 21 PDF tools (merge, split, compress, watermark, sign, edit, and more), 10 image tools (crop, resize, filters, blur, watermark), and 8 developer tools (JSON, hash, Base64, diff, markdown).
faq.q4: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a4: No hard limit — it depends on your device's available memory. For very large video files, Firefox or Safari typically handle them better.
faq.q5: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a5: No installation needed. LocalConvert works directly in any modern browser. You can also install it as a PWA from the address bar for an app-like experience.
faq.label: Questions
